description:
Daily 8 AM PHT cron. Identifies applicants stuck in Stage 10 (Passed
Assessment) for over 48h and emails the HR Recruitment Manager group
a digest so they advance or refuse the applicants manually.

Read-only on applicants — does not mutate any records. Group-based
notification (no hardcoded recipient emails). HTML rendered via
mail.mail (message_notify would escape HTML in SaaS safe_eval).
